string.name: prompt
string.value: Write a blog post about AI

nodes.name: Set Input Parameters
nodes.notes:
Configure your prompt and settings here:
- promptperfect_url: Your PromptPerfect instance URL
- prompt: The text to optimize
- mode: better, specific, cot, developer, research, beginner, product, marketing
- provider: gemini, openai, anthropic

nodes.name: Call PromptPerfect API
nodes.notes: Sends the prompt to PromptPerfect for optimization

nodes.name: Extract Results
nodes.notes:
Parses the API response and extracts:
- Original prompt
- Optimized prompt
- Explanation of changes
- Mode and provider used
